title: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI GPT 5 models (preview)
body:
Model Serving now supports the OpenAI [GPT-5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5), [GPT-5 mini](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-mini) and [GPT-5 nano](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-nano) models in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Reach out to your account teams to access these models during the preview.

These models are optimized for AI Functions, which means you can [perform batch inference](/aws/en/large-language-models/ai-functions) using these models and AI Functions like `ai_query()`.

For real-time inference workloads, see the following pages:

* [Query a chat model](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-chat-models)
* [Query reasoning models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-reason-models)
* [Query vision models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-vision-models)
* [Function calling](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/function-calling)
